# AI Hair Color Virtual Try-On

## Overview
Explore a wide range of hair colors with our hair color changer! Try the hair color you've always dreamed of and experiment with new shades youâ€™ve never tried before. Easily adjust the intensity of your chosen color with sliders for a customized look.

   * Upload Your Image

Upload the photo you want to change hair color for.

   * Choose Preset Colors or Customize by Pattern and Palettes

Choose from predefined color presets or fine tune by adjusting the ombre coverage and blend for unlimited possibilities!

> **Warning:** If both a preset and pattern + palettes are specified, the preset will take priority.

> **Warning:** Your source image needs to contain the hair section for dyeing, so double-check before applying. Make sure your source image includes the hair area you want to dye â€” it's your responsibility to get it right.

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/hair_color_s2_poster_dt_v2_49198cabc0.png)

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/01_1_1_8365c3b503.jpg)

![](https://bcw-media.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com/01_2_1_abfcdb7eba.jpg)

### File Specs & Errors
* Supported Formats & Dimensions

|AI Feature|Supported Dimensions|Supported File Size|Supported Formats|
|  ----  | ----  | ----  | ----  |
|AI Hair Color|long side < 1920, face width >= 100|< 10MB|jpg/jpeg/png|

* Error Codes

|Error Code|Description|
|  ----  | ----  |
|error_below_min_image_size|the size of the source image is smaller than minimum (expect: width >= 320px, height >= 320px)
|error_exceed_max_image_size|the size of the source image is larger than maximum (expect: width < 1920px, height < 1080px)

* Environment & Dependency

| Sample Code Language / Tool | Recommended Runtime Versions |
|---|---|
| cURL | - bash >= 3.2</br>   - curl >= 7.58 (modern TLS/HTTP support)</br>   - jq >= 1.6 (robust JSON parsing) |
| Node.js (JavaScript) | Node >= 18 (for global fetch) |
| JavaScript | - Chrome / Edge >= 80</br>   - Firefox >= 74</br>   - Safari >= 13.1 |
| PHP | PHP >= 7.4 (for modern TLS/compat), ext-curl (recommended) or allow_url_fopen=On + ext-openssl, ext-json |
| Python | Python >= 3.10 (for f-strings), requests >= 2.20.0 |
| Java | Java 11+ (for HttpClient), Jackson Databind >= 2.12.0 |

## Reference

- **API version:** V1.0
- **OpenAPI version:** 3.0.0
- **Source:** [OpenAPI description](https://docs.perfectcorp.com/_bundle/reference/ai_hair_color.yaml)
- **Servers:** `https://yce-api-01.makeupar.com`

## Authentication

| Name | Type | Scheme / Location | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| BearerAuthenticationV2 | http | bearer | Use the standard 'Bearer authentication'. Put your 'API Key' in header: `Authorization:Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`. Notice that there is ' ' a space between 'Bearer' and the 'YOUR_API_KEY'. |

## Endpoints

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/file/hair-color`
**Create a new file.**

To upload a new file, you'll first need to use the File API. It will give you a URL â€“ use that URL to upload your file. Once the upload is finished, you can use the file_id from the same response to start using our AI features.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** Â· required

**Schema:** `FileV1.1`

This object represents a file.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `files` | `array<object>` | Yes | â€” |
| `files.content_type` | `string` | Yes | Content MIME type for this file. Currently available values are listed in the enum. |
| `files.file_name` | `string` | Yes | Name of this file |
| `files.file_size` | `integer` | Yes | Content length for this file in bytes. Should not be larger than 10MB. |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful retrieval of file upload information

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `FileResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `BasicFileResponse` | No | â€” |
| `data.files` | `array<object>` | No | â€” |
| `data.files.content_type` | `string` | No | Content MIME type for this file. |
| `data.files.file_name` | `string` | No | Name of this file |
| `data.files.file_id` | `string` | No | ID of this file. Other run task API will need this `file_id`. |
| `data.files.requests` | `array<object>` | No | Using upload `url`, `headers`, `method` below to upload file. After completion, the `file_id` is used to proceed with calling run task API. |

**400** â€” Invalid request parameters

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidParameters` | No | â€” |

### `POST` `/s2s/v2.0/task/hair-color`
**Run a Hair Color task.**

This endpoint initiates the hair color change process. You must provide a source file (via URL or File ID) and specify the color settings (preset, pattern, or palettes). The task will be processed asynchronously, and you can check its status using the task_id returned in this response.

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Request body

**application/json** Â· required

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileUrl | BasicRunTaskV2SrcFileId & RunHairColorTaskParams`

This object represents a run AI Hair Color task.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `src_file_url` | `string` | Yes | Url of the file to run task. The url should be publicly accessible. |
| `src_file_id` | `string` | Yes | ID of file to run task. File ID from upload file API. |
| `preset` | `string â€” Jet Black \| Chocolate Brown \| Honey Blonde \| Platinum Blonde \| Ash Gray \| Rose Gold \| Burgundy \| Copper Red \| Lavender \| Teal Blue \| Dark Brown/Caramel Blonde \| Jet Black/Silver Gray \| Ash Brown/Lavender \| Rose Gold/Peach Blonde \| Burgundy/Magenta Pink \| Deep Blue/Teal Green \| Plum Purple/Pastel Lilac \| Copper Red/Golden Blonde \| Dark Gray/Ice Blonde \| Midnight Blue/Denim Blue` | No | (optional; required if neither "pattern" nor "palettes" is provided) Default hair color preset. Available for full mode: ['Jet Black', 'Chocolate Brown', 'Honey Blonde', 'Platinum Blonde', 'Ash Gray', 'Rose Gold', 'Burgundy', 'Copper Red', 'Lavender', 'Teal Blue'] Available for ombre mode: ['Dark Brown/Caramel Blonde', 'Jet Black/Silver Gray', 'Ash Brown/Lavender', 'Rose Gold/Peach Blonde', 'Burgundy/Magenta Pink', 'Deep Blue/Teal Green', 'Plum Purple/Pastel Lilac', 'Copper Red/Golden Blonde', 'Dark Gray/Ice Blonde', 'Midnight Blue/Denim Blue'] |
| `pattern` | `object` | No | (optional; required if "preset" is not provided) |
| `pattern.name` | `string â€” ombre \| full` | Yes | Pattern type (required) |
| `pattern.blend_strength` | `integer` | No | (optional; required for ombre) Blend strength (0â€“100) |
| `pattern.line_offset` | `number` | No | (optional; required for ombre) Vertical offset (â€“0.99 to 0.99). 0.99: top color covers 99% of bottom half;   â€“0.99: bottom color covers 99% of top half |
| `pattern.coloring_section` | `string â€” top` | No | (optional; required for ombre) Section to color |
| `palettes` | `array<object>` | No | (optional; required if "preset" is not provided)   Array length 1 for full mode, 2 for ombre mode |
| `palettes.color` | `string` | Yes | Hex color code |
| `palettes.color_intensity` | `integer` | No | Color intensity (0â€“100) |
| `palettes.shine_intensity` | `integer` | No | Shine intensity (0â€“100) |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful execution of the Hair Color task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `BasicRunTaskResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | â€” |
| `data.task_id` | `string` | No | ID of this task. Task result is valid to query by this ID for 24 hours. |

**400** â€” Failed execution of task

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `RunError`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error` | `string` | No | Error message |
| `error_code` | `string â€” CreditInsufficiency \| InvalidStyleGroup \| InvalidStyle \| BadRequest \| InvalidParameters` | No | â€” |

**401** â€” Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidApiKey \| InactiveApiKey \| ExpiredApiKey` | No | â€” |

**429** â€” Too many requests within a given amount of time

### `GET` `/s2s/v2.0/task/hair-color/{task_id}`
**Check a Hair Color task status.**

**Tags:** V1.0

**Authentication:** BearerAuthenticationV2
#### Parameters

| Name | In | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `task_id` | path | `string` | Yes | ID of task to check |

#### Responses

**200** â€” Successful check of the Hair Color task status

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `TaskStatusResponseV2`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `data` | `object` | No | â€” |
| `data.task_status` | `string â€” running \| success \| error` | No | Status of this task |
| `data.error` | `EngineErrorCode â€” exceed_max_filesize \| invalid_parameter \| error_download_image \| error_decode_image \| error_nsfw_content_detected \| error_inference \| unknown_internal_error \| null` | No | Errors: - `exceed_max_filesize` - Input file size exceeds the maximum limit - `invalid_parameter` - Invalid parameter value - `error_download_image` - Download source image error - `error_decode_image` - Decode source image error - `unknown_internal_error` - Others |
| `data.error_message` | `string` | No | Detailed description of error |
| `data.results` | `TaskStatusResponseBodySingleUrlResultsV2` | No | â€” |
| `data.results.url` | `string` | No | URL to download this result. Valid for 2 hours |

**400** â€” Invalid task id

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidTaskId` | No | â€” |

**401** â€” Invalid API Key or Inactive API Key or Expired API Key

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status` | `integer` | No | Response status |
| `error_code` | `string â€” InvalidApiKey \| InactiveApiKey \| ExpiredApiKey` | No | â€” |

**500** â€” The task has no response in the expected time

Content types: `application/json`

**Schema:** `object`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
